2026-07-09FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Consul General of Canada in New York (United States of America), with concurrent accreditation as non-resident Consul General of Canada in BermudaAppointment of Susannah Pierce as Consul General of Canada in New York (United States of America), with concurrent accreditation as non-resident Consul General of Canada in Bermuda, effective September 1, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Consul General of Canada in New York (United States of America), with concurrent accreditation as non-resident Consul General of Canada in Bermuda
precis: Appointment of Susannah Pierce as Consul General of Canada in New York (United States of America), with concurrent accreditation as non-resident Consul General of Canada in Bermuda, effective September 1, 2026.
